name: smart-explore
tagline: Directs Claude to use tree-sitter MCP tools (smart_search/outline/unfold) instead of Read/Grep/Glob for token-efficient code exploration.
verdict: Safe, read-only code-exploration skill: no network egress, secret access, or destructive operations found. Minor gaps: no version/changelog field so consumers can't tell if it changed; an optional custom-grammar example runs an unpinned `npm install`; and failure handling only covers the unsupported-language fallback, not tool-call errors or empty results.

highlights.summary: Optional custom-grammar example installs a well-known-sounding but unpinned package from the standard npm registry; it's an opt-in advanced feature, not part of the default flow, but still shown unpin
Only one failure mode (unsupported language) has a stated fallback; nothing addresses a smart_* tool call erroring, returning zero results, or an invalid file_path.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
